reason: A 'type is image/video/audio/document/archive' rule condition is a functional addition to the rules engine (a MediaKind ConditionField matched against a kind→extensions map in SortService), not a redesign. The UI diff adds the new field to the existing condition dropdown and, for that field only, swaps the value text box for a small kinds dropdown built with the same ComboBoxItem+Tag pattern already used for scope and operators, reusing the established row, palette and layout. Wheel geometry, colours, animations and the editor layout are untouched. The rest of the diff is SortService plumbing and tests. No new screen or visual language was introduced, so there is nothing for a mockup set to compare against.
